claim_ko: SandboxAQ AQtive Guard는 데모/무료체험 기반으로 접근하는 상용 플랫폼이며, 공식 자료에서 AI 기반 분석, 위험 우선순위화, cryptographic posture management, live network traffic/TLS handshake/runtime tracing, PQC impact simulation을 명시한다. 공개 소스 리포지토리 형태의 제품으로는 확인하지 않았다.
presentation_limits: Treat AQtive Guard as a commercial, closed platform rather than an open-source comparator.
Mark AI-powered risk analysis and prioritization as supported based on official documentation.
Do not claim our PoC exceeds AQtive Guard's commercial runtime/network coverage.
Use our open repository, reproducible testbed, and NIST SP 1800-38 learning workflow as the contrast.

official_evidence.finding: The homepage offers Book a Demo / Free Trial access and describes AI security plus cryptographic posture management.
The product page describes discovering, evaluating, and governing AI models, agents, and MCP servers.
The user guide describes AQG as a unified, AI-driven platform and lists AI-powered insights and risk analysis.
The guide describes Cryptographic Posture Management, AI-SPM, native sensors, live network traffic processing, and analysis against active rules.

The cryptography page describes discovering keys, certificates, cryptographic operations, context-aware risk, risk scoring, impact simulation, CBOM reporting, network analysis, runtime tracing, live TLS handshakes, and PQC migration planning.
SandboxAQ announced AQtive Guard as generally available for all market segments and described enterprise cryptography management from inventory to remediation.
The trial page describes a 30-day trial and AI-powered discovery and analysis for cryptographic asset inventory.

comparison_guidance.aqtive_guard_column: AI 평가, 상용 플랫폼, cryptographic inventory, runtime/network visibility는 공식 자료 기준으로 ○ 처리한다.
comparison_guidance.our_system_column: 오픈 리포지토리, 재현 가능한 테스트베드, NIST SP 1800-38 절차를 직접 실험하는 교육/시연형 PoC를 차별점으로 둔다.
comparison_guidance.do_not_claim: AQtive Guard를 단순 정적 스캐너로 낮춰 설명하거나, 우리 PoC가 상용 제품의 네트워크/runtime/자동 remediation 범위를 능가한다고 말하지 않는다.
